Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I picked up the ingredients to make chicken sauté today, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I might have bought too much. I think my eyes are bigger than my stomach.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I always end up having leftovers. What about you, {f 4 1}-kun? Would you say you're a big eater?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Really? Aren't you a growing boy? I thought you'd be eating a lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Then again, you are pretty slim, so I guess it makes sense.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Hmm... Today's portion might be too much, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Ooh, sounds like a healthy appetite! You're in luck, because we've got plenty![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Don't get your hopes too high, okay? I haven't been cooking much lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 6 25 25}Come on, you're worried before I even make it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I'm sure it helps if it tastes good, but don't set your expectations too high...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Well, either way... it'll be packed full of nutrients, so don't worry about that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}They say your health is your most valuable asset, y'know? I figured we should think about what we're putting into our bodies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And if I could lose some weight while we're at it, I'd kill two birds with one stone... But let's put that aside for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Anyway, why don't we start with veggies? {f 4 1}-kun, can you cut the tomatoes for me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I made chicken sauté with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I chose breast meat because it was cheap, and I heard it's good for a diet, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It's kinda dry... Okay, very dry. I can barely chew through it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Man, that was unexpected... I don't usually mess up this kind of thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}H-Hey! You're doubting me, aren't you? I'm serious![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'll make up for it next time, so let's cook together again when you get the chance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 7 1 2}It'll be so delicious, you can't help saying "yum!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}There was a program on TV the other day showing how to make tender chicken breasts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Slice against the grain, marinate it in sauce, and then cook gently at a low temperature...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm gonna reclaim my pride today! Just you wait![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I'll make it so good you'll be asking for seconds![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 10 25 25}Come on, have a little faith! I did some serious research, y'know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I'll show you what I'm really made of. Just forget about last time, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 10 25 25}Hey, that's just mean. But I guess after what happened last time, I can't really blame you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}That's why I'm gonna go all out today. I'll prove that I've learned from my research.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}So, we have to wash our hands first, and then... {f 4 1}-kun, you're in charge of the rice and veggies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I made chicken sauté with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}It's so tender and juicy... Way better than last time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}See!? This is what I'm capable of! I knew I could do it if I tried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Hehe, I can tell you like it too, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 5 13 7 1 2}That look on your face says it all! I couldn't help but laugh when you started wolfing it down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Anyway, let's eat up! We still have cleaning to do after this.[n]{f 1 1}
